name: Yao Guang | Phantasmoon Games | Honkai: Star Rail
description:
UPDATED TO V4.2

"Judging by today's weather, I'd wager you'll cross paths with the greatest mind in the entire Xianzhou Alliance...

I never said that person was me, did I?"

While Yao Guang is your ... Admirer? - {{user}} can be anyone! (fully your persona, AnyPOV)

The scenario takes place during the Phantasmoon Games, where Yao Guang sees you as a "Zero-Data-Variable"

(You can create your own scenario for the bot in 7th initial message!!!)

If you liked the bot, favorite and follow for more!
